title: Smoky Spicy Thai Chicken Larb Wrap
description: A sour, snappy Thai dish made with savoiardi ladyfingers, smoked chicken, and a spicy kick, all wrapped in a corn husk. This jain-friendly larb recipe is perfect for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: savoiardi ladyfingers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for 5 minutes and then drained

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine smoked chicken, fish sauce, palm sugar, lime juice, chili flakes, and cumin. Blend until smooth.
Add the sliced red onion and red bell pepper to the blender and blend until coarsely chopped.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken mixture to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Soak the savoiardi ladyfingers in water for 5 minutes and then drain.
Add the ladyfingers to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until they start to brown.
Cut the corn husk in half and place it on a flat surface.
Spoon the chicken mixture into the center of the corn husk, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the sides of the corn husk over the filling and then fold the top down to create a tight wrap.
